name: Cheesecake with Raspberries and Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar, egg, sour cream, and vanilla using an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Bake for 20 minutes or until the center is almost set.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack for 5 minutes.
6. Spoon fudge sauce over the top in a few dollops.
7. Cool for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Spread the fudge sauce evenly over the cake.
9. Chill thoroughly before serving.
10. Just before serving, arrange fresh raspberries on top of the fudge sauce.
11. If desired, sprinkle lightly with powdered sugar and cocoa powder.
12. Garnish with mint leaves.
